# logan.ink — AI/LLM context file

Logan Hanks is a cancer-prevention and population-science researcher. This site documents his grants portfolio, methods glossary, essays, and field notes.

## Key resources

- /grants — Curated hub of cancer-prevention grant opportunities with deadlines, mechanisms, and career-stage filters
- /glossary — Methods glossary defining epidemiological and statistical terms used across the research
- /writing — Essays and field notes on research practice, public health, and scientific method
- /field — Live field feed: brief dispatches and observations from ongoing work
- /research — Overview of active and past research projects
- /cv — Full curriculum vitae

## MCP endpoint (agent access)

Agents can query grants, profile data, and publications via the public Model Context Protocol endpoint:

  https://logan.ink/mcp/mcp

This endpoint exposes structured tools for retrieving grant listings, Logan's profile, and publication metadata. Connect with any MCP-compatible client.

## Canonical URL

https://logan.ink
